expo.name: SteadiDay
expo.description: SteadiDay is a daily health and wellness assistant designed for adults 50 and older who live independently. The app helps manage medications with photo-based auto-fill, daily tasks and appointments, health metrics from Apple Health, and emergency contacts with SOS functionality. Features include large text, high-contrast design, fall detection, calendar and reminders sync, mind break games, and helpful tools like a magnifier and flashlight.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SteadiDay uses the camera to capture photos inside the app before you publish them.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SteadiDay uses the microphone to record audio tracks that the app attaches to your creations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SteadiDay accesses your photo library to let you choose media that appears in the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SteadiDay uses your location to show nearby content and services while you use the app.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: SteadiDay accesses your contacts to help you find people you already know inside the app.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: SteadiDay uses your calendar to place app events onto your device schedule.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SteadiDay uses motion data to run movement-based features you enable in the app.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: SteadiDay uses speech recognition to turn your spoken words into text inside the app.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SteadiDay needs access to your location to show weather for your area and help you share your location with emergency contacts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your location in the background to help you find your parked car.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SteadiDay needs access to your location to show weather for your area and help you share your location with emergency contacts.

plugins.calendarPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your calendars to show and manage your events and appointments.
plugins.remindersPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your reminders to sync your tasks with Apple Reminders.

plugins.contactsPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your contacts to help you quickly add emergency contacts.

plugins.cameraPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your camera to take photos for your profile and medications.

plugins.photosPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your photos to let you choose images for your profile and medications.
plugins.cameraPermission: SteadiDay needs access to your camera to take photos for your profile and medications.

plugins.faceIDPermission: SteadiDay uses Face ID to secure your private health information.

plugins.microphonePermission: SteadiDay uses the microphone so you can dictate medication and task details by voice.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: SteadiDay reads your step count, heart rate, and other health metrics from Apple Health to display in the Health screen.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: SteadiDay records a background safety workout session to keep fall detection active when the app is not in the foreground.
